name: handover-validator
description: Vendored copy of the review-plugin-mvp handover-doc parser, wrapped in a CLI that gates skill-written pr-<N>-review-decisions.md files. See SOURCE.md.

scripts.build: esbuild cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/validate.mjs --banner:js="// GENERATED by 'npm run build' (esbuild bundle of cli.ts + vendor/*.ts + zod). Do not edit by hand."
